title: FizzBuzz
description: Write a Python function that takes an integer n and returns 'Fizz' if it is divisible by 3, 'Buzz' if divisible by 5, 'FizzBuzz' if divisible by both, and the number as a string otherwise.
clarification: Return "FizzBuzz" for multiples of both 3 and 5, "Fizz" for multiples of 3 only, "Buzz" for multiples of 5 only, and the number as a string otherwise. Example: fizzbuzz(15) → "FizzBuzz", fizzbuzz(9) → "Fizz", fizzbuzz(10) → "Buzz", fizzbuzz(7) → "7".
